description_long: This hardware store is a large, rectangular commercial building with a broad, gently sloped roof and a modern, utilitarian design. The exterior features expansive glass windows along the front and rear facades, allowing for ample natural light and visibility into the store. The main entrance is centrally located on the longer side, flanked by additional glass panels and sheltered by a modest overhang. There are secondary structures attached to the sides, possibly for loading or storage, and a paved area surrounds the building, likely for customer access and parking. The color palette is primarily light gray and off-white, giving the building a clean and contemporary appearance. The overall structure suggests a focus on functionality and accessibility, typical of large retail hardware stores.
description: A large, modern hardware store with a sloped roof, expansive glass windows, and a clean, light-colored exterior. The building features a central entrance and side extensions for additional access or storage.
description_view_0: The long side of the hardware store is visible, showing the main entrance, large glass windows, and a side extension.
description_view_1: The short end of the building is shown, highlighting the wide roof and symmetrical glass facade with the entrance centered.
description_view_2: The opposite long side is visible, featuring a secondary entrance or loading area and additional glass panels.
description_view_3: The other short end is shown, mirroring the front with a similar glass facade and architectural symmetry.
attribute_storefront_layout: The storefront features a central entrance on the long side, flanked by large glass windows and a modest overhang. Side extensions and paved areas are visible, with symmetrical facades on both short ends.
